description_long: This is a robust hand axe featuring a dark, slightly curved wooden handle with visible grain and a textured grip area. The axe head is forged from dark metal, with a broad, angular blade on one side and a pointed poll on the opposite end. The blade has a pronounced edge and a subtle beard, giving it a functional yet slightly aggressive appearance. The head is securely mounted to the handle, with a visible collar and a wedge at the top for reinforcement. The overall finish is matte and rugged, suggesting heavy-duty use, possibly for chopping wood or as a utility tool. No visible branding or decorative engravings are present, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A rugged hand axe with a dark wooden handle and a broad, angular metal blade, featuring a pointed poll and a textured grip.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the pointed poll and the alignment of the handle with the head.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the broad, angular blade and the curved wooden handle with textured grip.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the bottom, displaying the pointed poll and the handle's end.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the blade's edge profile and the secure mounting of the head to the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, textured grip, and oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, angular single-edged blade with a subtle beard and a pointed poll on the opposite side.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible collar and wedge at the top.
